title: eriogonum effusum subsp. salinum
intro: Eriogonum effusum subsp. salinum, also known as desert trumpet or red-stemmed buckwheat, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Eriogonum genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eriogonum effusum subsp. salinum include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and provide relief from respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
